input: Create a BeehiveIllustration for a future apiary section — hive boxes, flowers, bees
Add a WinterIllustration for a seasonal home screen variant — snow on the barn roof, bare trees, frozen pond
Create a SunriseIllustration for the morning home screen — fog lifting over hills, amber sky, rooster silhouette
Create a FamilyDogIllustration showing Maple the golden doodle sitting in a meadow
Create a WeatherIllustration for a weather widget — rolling clouds, rain drops, and a partial rainbow
failures: PAPER_CUTOUT_STYLE: The illustration uses soft blue gradients and overlapping ellipses but lacks the distinct flat layered depth planes of a paper cut-out aesthetic. There is no clear ground/terrain layer, and the color differences between layers are too subtle (all muted blues) to read as distinct stacked planes. No ground layer is present at all.

COLOR_VARIETY: The palette is almost entirely muted blue-grays (#87CEEB, #E8F4F8, #D4E8F0, #B8D9E8, #4DA6D6) with only token warm color in the rainbow strokes. There are no dark background anchor values (deep layer1/layer2 equivalents) and no warm, light, or contrasting foreground accents — the scene lacks the required contrast between dark background values and lighter/warmer foreground values.
